diff --git a/ep_synthetic_frontier_sfx_derivatives_market_technical_design_brief_v2/solution/shock_simulation_harness/engine.py b/ep_synthetic_frontier_sfx_derivatives_market_technical_design_brief_v2/solution/shock_simulation_harness/engine.py
new file mode 100644
index 0000000000000000000000000000000000000000..ed6fceb3ed57464f0422a4ec731e56e4e9351ab3
--- /dev/null
+++ b/ep_synthetic_frontier_sfx_derivatives_market_technical_design_brief_v2/solution/shock_simulation_harness/engine.py
@@ -0,0 +1,838 @@
+from __future__ import annotations
+
+import json
+import math
+from dataclasses import asdict, dataclass
+from pathlib import Path
+from typing import Any, Dict, Mapping
+
+from dynamic_leverage_band_engine import (
+    LeverageBandInputs,
+    calculate_effective_leverage_band,
+)
+from stress_response_orchestrator.engine import StressResponseEngine
+
+
+SEVERITY_RANK = {"normal": 0, "warning": 1, "elevated": 2, "emergency": 3}
+HALT_THRESHOLDS = {
+    "index_divergence_bps": 1200,
+    "source_health_floor": 0.45,
+    "depth_floor_ratio": 0.35,
+    "depth_collapse_velocity": 0.55,
+}
+TRANSPARENCY_FIELDS = {
+    "schema_version",
+    "published_at",
+    "market_status",
+    "vault_capital",
+    "long_short_imbalance",
+    "open_interest",
+    "current_leverage_band",
+    "funding_rate",
+    "volatility_metric",
+    "risk_parameter_band",
+}
+
+
+def _clamp(value: float, lower: float, upper: float) -> float:
+    return max(lower, min(upper, value))
+
+
+def _severity_from_thresholds(value: float, thresholds: tuple[float, float, float]) -> str:
+    warning, elevated, emergency = thresholds
+    if value >= emergency:
+        return "emergency"
+    if value >= elevated:
+        return "elevated"
+    if value >= warning:
+        return "warning"
+    return "normal"
+
+
+def _round_dict(values: Mapping[str, float], digits: int = 6) -> dict[str, float]:
+    return {key: round(value, digits) for key, value in values.items()}
+
+
+@dataclass(frozen=True)
+class ScenarioResult:
+    scenario_id: str
+    instrument_id: str
+    shock_size: float
+    liquidity_regime: str
+    source_degradation_mode: str
+    aggregate_stress_level: str
+    halt_state: str
+    vault_outcome: dict[str, Any]
+    funding_stabilization_result: dict[str, Any]
+    scorecard: dict[str, Any]
+    market_status_timeline: list[dict[str, Any]]
+    control_reactions: dict[str, Any]
+    transparency_snapshot: dict[str, Any]
+    metric_values: dict[str, float]
+    metric_severities: dict[str, str]
+    reproducibility_hash: str
+
+    def as_dict(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:
+        return asdict(self)
+
+
+class ShockSimulationHarness:
+    def __init__(
+        self,
+        *,
+        scenario_library: Mapping[str, Any],
+        listing_pack: Mapping[str, Any],
+        response_engine: StressResponseEngine,
+    ) -> None:
+        self.scenario_library = scenario_library
+        self.response_engine = response_engine
+        self.launch_assumptions = listing_pack["launch_assumptions"]
+        self.instrument_map = {
+            item["instrument_id"]: item for item in listing_pack["instruments"]
+        }
+
+    @classmethod
+    def from_paths(
+        cls,
+        *,
+        scenario_path: Path,
+        listing_pack_path: Path,
+        response_matrix_path: Path,
+    ) -> "ShockSimulationHarness":
+        scenario_library = json.loads(scenario_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
+        listing_pack = json.loads(listing_pack_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
+        response_engine = StressResponseEngine.from_path(response_matrix_path)
+        return cls(
+            scenario_library=scenario_library,
+            listing_pack=listing_pack,
+            response_engine=response_engine,
+        )
+
+    def run_all(self) -> list[ScenarioResult]:
+        return [self.run_scenario(item) for item in self.scenario_library["scenarios"]]
+
+    def run_scenario(self, scenario: Mapping[str, Any]) -> ScenarioResult:
+        instrument = self.instrument_map[scenario["instrument_id"]]
+        metric_values = self._compute_metric_values(scenario)
+        metric_severities = self._compute_metric_severities(metric_values, scenario)
+        aggregate_stress_level = self._aggregate_stress_level(metric_severities, scenario)
+        signal_states = {
+            signal: severity
+            for signal, severity in metric_severities.items()
+            if severity != "normal"
+        }
+        response = self.response_engine.resolve(
+            signal_states,
+            instrument_id=scenario["instrument_id"],
+            current_level="normal",
+            seconds_in_state=0,
+        )
+        leverage_output = self._compute_leverage_output(scenario, instrument)
+        spread_result = self._compute_spread_result(
+            scenario=scenario,
+            instrument=instrument,
+            aggregate_stress_level=aggregate_stress_level,
+        )
+        funding_result = self._compute_funding_result(
+            scenario=scenario,
+            instrument=instrument,
+            response_actions=response.publishable_payload["actions"],
+        )
+        vault_outcome = self._compute_vault_outcome(
+            scenario=scenario,
+            instrument=instrument,
+            response_actions=response.publishable_payload["actions"],
+            funding_result=funding_result,
+        )
+        halt_state = self._determine_halt_state(
+            scenario, metric_values, aggregate_stress_level
+        )
+        market_status_timeline = self._build_market_status_timeline(
+            scenario=scenario,
+            aggregate_stress_level=aggregate_stress_level,
+            halt_state=halt_state,
+        )
+        transparency_snapshot = self._build_transparency_snapshot(
+            scenario=scenario,
+            instrument=instrument,
+            aggregate_stress_level=aggregate_stress_level,
+            halt_state=halt_state,
+            leverage_output=leverage_output.as_dict(),
+            funding_result=funding_result,
+            spread_result=spread_result,
+            vault_outcome=vault_outcome,
+        )
+        scorecard = self._build_scorecard(
+            scenario=scenario,
+            instrument=instrument,
+            aggregate_stress_level=aggregate_stress_level,
+            halt_state=halt_state,
+            funding_result=funding_result,
+            spread_result=spread_result,
+            vault_outcome=vault_outcome,
+            transparency_snapshot=transparency_snapshot,
+            leverage_output=leverage_output.as_dict(),
+        )
+        reproducibility_hash = self._build_reproducibility_hash(
+            scenario_id=scenario["scenario_id"],
+            aggregate_stress_level=aggregate_stress_level,
+            halt_state=halt_state,
+            final_vault_capital=vault_outcome["final_vault_capital"],
+            funding_rate=funding_result["funding_rate_per_hour"],
+            scorecard_pass=scorecard["overall_pass"],
+        )
+        control_reactions = {
+            "stress_response": response.publishable_payload,
+            "leverage_band": leverage_output.as_dict(),
+            "spread_control": spread_result,
+            "circuit_breaker": {
+                "halt_state": halt_state,
+                "trigger_families": self._active_halt_families(scenario, metric_values),
+            },
+        }
+        return ScenarioResult(
+            scenario_id=scenario["scenario_id"],
+            instrument_id=scenario["instrument_id"],
+            shock_size=scenario["shock_size"],
+            liquidity_regime=scenario["liquidity_regime"],
+            source_degradation_mode=scenario["source_degradation_mode"],
+            aggregate_stress_level=aggregate_stress_level,
+            halt_state=halt_state,
+            vault_outcome=vault_outcome,
+            funding_stabilization_result=funding_result,
+            scorecard=scorecard,
+            market_status_timeline=market_status_timeline,
+            control_reactions=control_reactions,
+            transparency_snapshot=transparency_snapshot,
+            metric_values=_round_dict(metric_values, 6),
+            metric_severities=metric_severities,
+            reproducibility_hash=reproducibility_hash,
+        )
+
+    def _compute_metric_values(self, scenario: Mapping[str, Any]) -> dict[str, float]:
+        return {
+            "volatility_acceleration": float(scenario["volatility_acceleration"]),
+            "imbalance_slope_change": float(scenario["imbalance_slope_change"]),
+            "liquidation_cluster_density": float(scenario["liquidation_cluster_density"]),
+            "order_book_thinning_rate": float(scenario["order_book_thinning_rate"]),
+            "oracle_health_degradation": round(
+                1.0 - float(scenario["source_health_score"]), 6
+            ),
+        }
+
+    def _compute_metric_severities(
+        self,
+        metric_values: Mapping[str, float],
+        scenario: Mapping[str, Any],
+    ) -> dict[str, str]:
+        source_mode = scenario["source_degradation_mode"]
+        source_health = float(scenario["source_health_score"])
+        source_quorum = bool(scenario["source_quorum_met"])
+        if source_mode == "halt" or not source_quorum or source_health < 0.45:
+            oracle_severity = "emergency"
+        elif source_mode == "hold_last_value" or source_health < 0.7:
+            oracle_severity = "elevated"
+        elif source_mode == "degraded" or source_health < 0.85:
+            oracle_severity = "warning"
+        else:
+            oracle_severity = "normal"
+        return {
+            "volatility_acceleration": _severity_from_thresholds(
+                metric_values["volatility_acceleration"], (0.20, 0.45, 0.75)
+            ),
+            "imbalance_slope_change": _severity_from_thresholds(
+                metric_values["imbalance_slope_change"], (12.0, 25.0, 40.0)
+            ),
+            "liquidation_cluster_density": _severity_from_thresholds(
+                metric_values["liquidation_cluster_density"], (0.015, 0.03, 0.05)
+            ),
+            "order_book_thinning_rate": _severity_from_thresholds(
+                metric_values["order_book_thinning_rate"], (0.18, 0.35, 0.55)
+            ),
+            "oracle_health_degradation": oracle_severity,
+        }
+
+    def _aggregate_stress_level(
+        self,
+        metric_severities: Mapping[str, str],
+        scenario: Mapping[str, Any],
+    ) -> str:
+        severities = list(metric_severities.values())
+        elevated_count = sum(1 for value in severities if value == "elevated")
+        warning_count = sum(1 for value in severities if value == "warning")
+        if "emergency" in severities:
+            return "emergency"
+        if scenario["source_degradation_mode"] == "halt":
+            return "emergency"
+        if elevated_count >= 2:
+            return "emergency"
+        if elevated_count >= 1:
+            return "elevated"
+        if warning_count >= 3:
+            return "elevated"
+        if warning_count >= 1:
+            return "warning"
+        return "normal"
+
+    def _compute_leverage_output(
+        self,
+        scenario: Mapping[str, Any],
+        instrument: Mapping[str, Any],
+    ):
+        return calculate_effective_leverage_band(
+            LeverageBandInputs(
+                instrument_id=scenario["instrument_id"],
+                timestamp_utc=scenario["event_timestamp"],
+                base_leverage=float(instrument["initial_leverage_band"]["max"]),
+                governance_max_leverage=float(
+                    self.launch_assumptions["governance_hard_max_leverage"]
+                ),
+                launch_max_leverage=float(
+                    self.launch_assumptions["phase_1_operational_max_leverage"]
+                ),
+                launch_mode=True,
+                realized_volatility=float(scenario["realized_volatility"]),
+                vault_imbalance=self._vault_imbalance_score(scenario, instrument),
+                depth_score=float(scenario["depth_score"]),
+                stress_velocity=float(scenario["stress_velocity"]),
+            )
+        )
+
+    def _compute_spread_result(
+        self,
+        *,
+        scenario: Mapping[str, Any],
+        instrument: Mapping[str, Any],
+        aggregate_stress_level: str,
+    ) -> dict[str, Any]:
+        base_min_spread = float(instrument["spread_floor"]["normal_bps"])
+        max_min_spread = float(instrument["spread_floor"]["stress_bps"])
+        volatility_score = _clamp(float(scenario["volatility_acceleration"]), 0.0, 1.0)
+        order_flow_velocity = _clamp(
+            float(scenario["imbalance_slope_change"]) / 40.0, 0.0, 1.0
+        )
+        vault_imbalance = self._vault_imbalance_score(scenario, instrument)
+        liquidity_thinning = _clamp(float(scenario["order_book_thinning_rate"]), 0.0, 1.0)
+        shock_coupling = max(
+            volatility_score * liquidity_thinning,
+            order_flow_velocity * vault_imbalance,
+        )
+        composite = (
+            0.35 * volatility_score
+            + 0.20 * order_flow_velocity
+            + 0.25 * vault_imbalance
+            + 0.20 * liquidity_thinning
+            + 0.25 * shock_coupling
+        )
+        control_state = "calm"
+        if composite >= 0.70 or max(
+            volatility_score, order_flow_velocity, vault_imbalance, liquidity_thinning
+        ) >= 0.85:
+            control_state = "shock"
+        elif composite >= 0.35 or max(
+            volatility_score, order_flow_velocity, vault_imbalance, liquidity_thinning
+        ) >= 0.60:
+            control_state = "elevated"
+
+        effective_min_spread = _clamp(
+            base_min_spread * (1.0 + composite),
+            base_min_spread,
+            max_min_spread,
+        )
+        return {
+            "aggregate_stress_level": aggregate_stress_level,
+            "control_state": control_state,
+            "composite_stress_score": round(composite, 6),
+            "effective_min_spread_bps": round(effective_min_spread, 2),
+            "quote_size_multiplier": (
+                1.0 if control_state == "calm" else 0.7 if control_state == "elevated" else 0.35
+            ),
+            "executability_ratio": round(
+                max(0.2, float(scenario["depth_score"]) * (1.1 - composite)),
+                4,
+            ),
+        }
+
+    def _compute_funding_result(
+        self,
+        *,
+        scenario: Mapping[str, Any],
+        instrument: Mapping[str, Any],
+        response_actions: Mapping[str, Any],
+    ) -> dict[str, Any]:
+        base_params = instrument["funding_base_params"]
+        long_share = float(scenario["long_interest_share"])
+        stressed_open_interest = float(scenario["baseline_open_interest_usdc"]) * (
+            1.0 + 0.45 * float(scenario["shock_size"])
+        )
+        long_open_interest = stressed_open_interest * long_share
+        short_open_interest = stressed_open_interest - long_open_interest
+        imbalance_pct = (long_open_interest - short_open_interest) / max(
+            long_open_interest + short_open_interest,
+            1.0,
+        )
+        volatility_target = max(float(scenario["realized_volatility"]) * 0.8, 0.10)
+        published_index_value = max(
+            0.02,
+            float(scenario["realized_volatility"]) * (1.0 + float(scenario["shock_size"])),
+        )
+        mark_price = published_index_value * (
+            1.0 + math.copysign(min(abs(imbalance_pct) * 0.08, 0.05), imbalance_pct)
+        )
+        premium_gap_pct = (mark_price - published_index_value) / max(
+            published_index_value,
+            1e-6,
+        )
+        volatility_ratio = published_index_value / max(volatility_target, 1e-6)
+        oi_velocity_ratio = abs(float(scenario["stress_velocity"])) / max(
+            float(base_params["open_interest_velocity_sensitivity"]),
+            1e-6,
+        )
+        confidence_modifier = max(float(scenario["source_health_score"]), 0.25)
+        imbalance_component = math.tanh(imbalance_pct / 0.25)
+        volatility_component = 1.0 + 0.60 * max(volatility_ratio - 1.0, 0.0)
+        oi_velocity_component = 1.0 + 0.35 * min(oi_velocity_ratio, 3.0)
+        premium_alignment_component = 1.0 + 0.25 * math.tanh(
+            premium_gap_pct / 0.05
+        ) * (1.0 if imbalance_component >= 0 else -1.0)
+        protective_multiplier = (
+            float(response_actions["funding_multiplier"]["value"]) / confidence_modifier
+        )
+        max_abs_rate = float(base_params["base_hourly_rate"]) * float(
+            base_params["stress_multiplier_cap"]
+        )
+        if scenario["source_degradation_mode"] == "halt":
+            funding_rate = 0.0
+        else:
+            raw_rate = (
+                float(base_params["base_hourly_rate"])
+                * imbalance_component
+                * volatility_component
+                * oi_velocity_component
+                * premium_alignment_component
+                * protective_multiplier
+            )
+            funding_rate = _clamp(raw_rate, -max_abs_rate, max_abs_rate)
+        stabilized = (
+            abs(funding_rate) <= max_abs_rate + 1e-9
+            and (
+                funding_rate == 0.0
+                or math.copysign(1.0, funding_rate) == math.copysign(1.0, imbalance_pct)
+            )
+        )
+        return {
+            "funding_rate_per_hour": round(funding_rate, 6),
+            "average_funding_rate_per_hour": round(funding_rate * 0.92, 6),
+            "imbalance_pct": round(imbalance_pct, 6),
+            "current_open_interest_usdc": round(stressed_open_interest, 2),
+            "long_open_interest_usdc": round(long_open_interest, 2),
+            "short_open_interest_usdc": round(short_open_interest, 2),
+            "funding_multiplier": round(
+                volatility_component
+                * oi_velocity_component
+                * premium_alignment_component
+                * protective_multiplier,
+                6,
+            ),
+            "max_abs_funding_rate_per_hour": round(max_abs_rate, 6),
+            "calculation_state": scenario["source_degradation_mode"],
+            "payer_side": "longs" if funding_rate >= 0 else "shorts",
+            "stabilized": stabilized,
+        }
+
+    def _compute_vault_outcome(
+        self,
+        *,
+        scenario: Mapping[str, Any],
+        instrument: Mapping[str, Any],
+        response_actions: Mapping[str, Any],
+        funding_result: Mapping[str, Any],
+    ) -> dict[str, Any]:
+        initial_capital = float(scenario["base_vault_capital_usdc"])
+        reserve_buffer = initial_capital * float(
+            self.launch_assumptions["reserve_buffer_fraction"]
+        )
+        stressed_open_interest = float(funding_result["current_open_interest_usdc"])
+        open_interest_cap = float(instrument["exposure_cap"]["open_interest_usd"]) * float(
+            response_actions["open_interest_cap"]["value"]
+        )
+        net_exposure = stressed_open_interest * float(funding_result["imbalance_pct"]) * 0.45
+        exposure_utilization = abs(net_exposure) / max(open_interest_cap, 1.0)
+        liquidation_loss = (
+            stressed_open_interest * float(scenario["liquidation_cluster_density"]) * 0.045
+        )
+        inventory_shock_loss = initial_capital * float(scenario["shock_size"]) * (
+            0.09
+            + 0.03 * float(scenario["order_book_thinning_rate"])
+            + 0.02 * (1.0 - float(scenario["source_health_score"]))
+        )
+        fee_income = stressed_open_interest * (
+            float(instrument["spread_floor"]["normal_bps"]) / 10000.0
+        ) * 0.012
+        funding_spread_income = (
+            abs(float(funding_result["funding_rate_per_hour"])) * stressed_open_interest * 0.22
+        )
+        final_capital = (
+            initial_capital
+            - liquidation_loss
+            - inventory_shock_loss
+            + fee_income
+            + funding_spread_income
+        )
+        available_backstop = max(final_capital - reserve_buffer, 0.0)
+        return {
+            "initial_vault_capital": round(initial_capital, 2),
+            "reserve_buffer": round(reserve_buffer, 2),
+            "final_vault_capital": round(final_capital, 2),
+            "available_backstop": round(available_backstop, 2),
+            "net_exposure": round(net_exposure, 2),
+            "open_interest_cap": round(open_interest_cap, 2),
+            "exposure_utilization": round(exposure_utilization, 6),
+            "vault_integrity_preserved": (
+                final_capital > reserve_buffer and exposure_utilization <= 1.0
+            ),
+            "loss_drivers": {
+                "liquidation_loss": round(liquidation_loss, 2),
+                "inventory_shock_loss": round(inventory_shock_loss, 2),
+                "fee_income": round(fee_income, 2),
+                "funding_spread_income": round(funding_spread_income, 2),
+            },
+        }
+
+    def _determine_halt_state(
+        self,
+        scenario: Mapping[str, Any],
+        metric_values: Mapping[str, float],
+        aggregate_stress_level: str,
+    ) -> str:
+        trigger_families = self._active_halt_families(scenario, metric_values)
+        if not trigger_families:
+            return "ACTIVE" if aggregate_stress_level == "normal" else "ELEVATED_WATCH"
+        if len(trigger_families) >= 2 or scenario["recovery_profile"] == "staged_reopen":
+            return "HALTED_LOCKDOWN"
+        return "HALTED"
+
+    def _active_halt_families(
+        self,
+        scenario: Mapping[str, Any],
+        metric_values: Mapping[str, float],
+    ) -> list[str]:
+        trigger_families: list[str] = []
+        depth_ratio = self._depth_within_band_ratio(scenario)
+        if float(scenario["index_divergence_bps"]) >= HALT_THRESHOLDS["index_divergence_bps"]:
+            trigger_families.append("index_divergence_breach")
+        if (
+            not bool(scenario["source_quorum_met"])
+            or float(scenario["source_health_score"]) < HALT_THRESHOLDS["source_health_floor"]
+            or scenario["source_degradation_mode"] == "halt"
+        ):
+            trigger_families.append("source_instability")
+        if (
+            depth_ratio < HALT_THRESHOLDS["depth_floor_ratio"]
+            and metric_values["order_book_thinning_rate"]
+            >= HALT_THRESHOLDS["depth_collapse_velocity"]
+        ):
+            trigger_families.append("depth_collapse")
+        return trigger_families
+
+    def _build_market_status_timeline(
+        self,
+        *,
+        scenario: Mapping[str, Any],
+        aggregate_stress_level: str,
+        halt_state: str,
+    ) -> list[dict[str, Any]]:
+        timeline = [
+            {"phase": "pre_shock", "state": "ACTIVE", "liquidity": "normal"},
+            {
+                "phase": "impact",
+                "state": "ELEVATED_WATCH" if aggregate_stress_level != "normal" else "ACTIVE",
+                "liquidity": scenario["liquidity_regime"],
+            },
+        ]
+        if halt_state == "HALTED_LOCKDOWN":
+            timeline.extend(
+                [
+                    {
+                        "phase": "controls_engaged",
+                        "state": "HALTED_LOCKDOWN",
+                        "liquidity": "cancel_only",
+                    },
+                    {
+                        "phase": "recovery_window",
+                        "state": "REOPEN_STAGE_1",
+                        "liquidity": "passive_only",
+                    },
+                    {
+                        "phase": "stabilized",
+                        "state": "ACTIVE_POST_RECOVERY",
+                        "liquidity": "restricted_matching",
+                    },
+                ]
+            )
+        elif halt_state == "HALTED":
+            timeline.extend(
+                [
+                    {
+                        "phase": "controls_engaged",
+                        "state": "HALTED",
+                        "liquidity": "cancel_only",
+                    },
+                    {
+                        "phase": "stabilized",
+                        "state": "REOPEN_STAGE_2",
+                        "liquidity": "limited_matching",
+                    },
+                ]
+            )
+        else:
+            timeline.append(
+                {
+                    "phase": "stabilized",
+                    "state": (
+                        "ACTIVE" if aggregate_stress_level == "warning" else "ACTIVE_POST_RECOVERY"
+                    ),
+                    "liquidity": "widened_but_functional",
+                }
+            )
+        return timeline
+
+    def _build_transparency_snapshot(
+        self,
+        *,
+        scenario: Mapping[str, Any],
+        instrument: Mapping[str, Any],
+        aggregate_stress_level: str,
+        halt_state: str,
+        leverage_output: Mapping[str, Any],
+        funding_result: Mapping[str, Any],
+        spread_result: Mapping[str, Any],
+        vault_outcome: Mapping[str, Any],
+    ) -> dict[str, Any]:
+        market_state = "normal"
+        if halt_state in {"HALTED", "HALTED_LOCKDOWN"}:
+            market_state = "halted"
+        elif aggregate_stress_level in {"warning", "elevated", "emergency"}:
+            market_state = "degraded"
+        return {
+            "schema_version": "1.0.0",
+            "published_at": scenario["event_timestamp"],
+            "market_status": {
+                "state": market_state,
+                "reason_code": aggregate_stress_level,
+                "review_cadence_seconds": 30,
+                "affected_instruments": [scenario["instrument_id"]],
+            },
+            "vault_capital": {
+                "currency": "USDC",
+                "total": vault_outcome["final_vault_capital"],
+                "committed_margin": round(vault_outcome["reserve_buffer"], 2),
+                "available_backstop": vault_outcome["available_backstop"],
+                "utilization_ratio": round(
+                    vault_outcome["reserve_buffer"]
+                    / max(vault_outcome["final_vault_capital"], 1.0),
+                    6,
+                ),
+            },
+            "long_short_imbalance": [
+                {
+                    "instrument_id": scenario["instrument_id"],
+                    "net_bias": "long" if funding_result["imbalance_pct"] > 0 else "short",
+                    "imbalance_ratio": funding_result["imbalance_pct"],
+                    "long_notional": funding_result["long_open_interest_usdc"],
+                    "short_notional": funding_result["short_open_interest_usdc"],
+                    "update_cadence_seconds": 30,
+                }
+            ],
+            "open_interest": [
+                {
+                    "instrument_id": scenario["instrument_id"],
+                    "contracts": round(
+                        funding_result["current_open_interest_usdc"] / 1000.0,
+                        2,
+                    ),
+                    "notional": funding_result["current_open_interest_usdc"],
+                    "velocity_1h_pct": round(float(scenario["stress_velocity"]) * 100.0, 2),
+                    "update_cadence_seconds": 30,
+                }
+            ],
+            "current_leverage_band": [
+                {
+                    "instrument_id": scenario["instrument_id"],
+                    "min_leverage": leverage_output["effective_leverage_band"][0],
+                    "max_leverage": leverage_output["effective_leverage_band"][1],
+                    "governance_max_leverage": self.launch_assumptions[
+                        "governance_hard_max_leverage"
+                    ],
+                    "drivers": [
+                        "realized_volatility",
+                        "vault_imbalance",
+                        "depth_score",
+                        "stress_velocity",
+                    ],
+                    "update_cadence_seconds": 5,
+                }
+            ],
+            "funding_rate": [
+                {
+                    "instrument_id": scenario["instrument_id"],
+                    "current_hourly_rate_bps": round(
+                        funding_result["funding_rate_per_hour"] * 10000.0,
+                        4,
+                    ),
+                    "projected_8h_rate_bps": round(
+                        funding_result["funding_rate_per_hour"] * 80000.0,
+                        4,
+                    ),
+                    "settlement_interval_seconds": 3600,
+                    "sign_convention": "positive_long_pays_short",
+                    "update_cadence_seconds": 300,
+                }
+            ],
+            "volatility_metric": [
+                {
+                    "instrument_id": scenario["instrument_id"],
+                    "realized_volatility_1h_pct": round(
+                        float(scenario["realized_volatility"]) * 100.0,
+                        2,
+                    ),
+                    "realized_volatility_24h_pct": round(
+                        float(scenario["realized_volatility"]) * 82.0,
+                        2,
+                    ),
+                    "volatility_acceleration_pct_per_hour": round(
+                        float(scenario["volatility_acceleration"]) * 100.0,
+                        2,
+                    ),
+                    "update_cadence_seconds": 30,
+                }
+            ],
+            "risk_parameter_band": [
+                {
+                    "instrument_id": scenario["instrument_id"],
+                    "stress_level": aggregate_stress_level,
+                    "effective_min_spread_bps": spread_result["effective_min_spread_bps"],
+                    "position_cap_notional": round(
+                        float(instrument["exposure_cap"]["open_interest_usd"]) * 0.5,
+                        2,
+                    ),
+                    "open_interest_cap_notional": vault_outcome["open_interest_cap"],
+                    "funding_multiplier_band": {
+                        "min": 1.0,
+                        "max": round(funding_result["funding_multiplier"], 4),
+                    },
+                    "update_cadence_seconds": 30,
+                }
+            ],
+        }
+
+    def _build_scorecard(
+        self,
+        *,
+        scenario: Mapping[str, Any],
+        instrument: Mapping[str, Any],
+        aggregate_stress_level: str,
+        halt_state: str,
+        funding_result: Mapping[str, Any],
+        spread_result: Mapping[str, Any],
+        vault_outcome: Mapping[str, Any],
+        transparency_snapshot: Mapping[str, Any],
+        leverage_output: Mapping[str, Any],
+    ) -> dict[str, Any]:
+        final_state = self._build_market_status_timeline(
+            scenario=scenario,
+            aggregate_stress_level=aggregate_stress_level,
+            halt_state=halt_state,
+        )[-1]["state"]
+        liquidity_pass = (
+            spread_result["executability_ratio"] >= 0.35
+            and self._depth_within_band_ratio(scenario) >= 0.25
+            and final_state in {"ACTIVE", "ACTIVE_POST_RECOVERY", "REOPEN_STAGE_2"}
+        )
+        transparency_pass = TRANSPARENCY_FIELDS.issubset(transparency_snapshot)
+        governance_pass = (
+            leverage_output["effective_leverage_band"][1]
+            <= self.launch_assumptions["governance_hard_max_leverage"]
+            and leverage_output["effective_leverage_band"][1]
+            <= self.launch_assumptions["phase_1_operational_max_leverage"]
+            and vault_outcome["open_interest_cap"]
+            <= float(instrument["exposure_cap"]["open_interest_usd"])
+            and scenario["governance_override"] == "none"
+        )
+        scorecard = {
+            "vault_capital_integrity": {
+                "pass": vault_outcome["vault_integrity_preserved"],
+                "detail": "Final vault capital remains above reserve buffer and exposure stays within the live cap.",
+            },
+            "liquidity_continuity": {
+                "pass": liquidity_pass,
+                "detail": "The market retains executable depth or returns to a functioning recovery state.",
+            },
+            "funding_stabilization": {
+                "pass": bool(funding_result["stabilized"]),
+                "detail": "Funding remains capped, directional, and attributable to imbalance plus stress controls.",
+            },
+            "transparency_outputs": {
+                "pass": transparency_pass,
+                "detail": "The published snapshot includes all required public transparency top-level fields.",
+            },
+            "governance_stability": {
+                "pass": governance_pass,
+                "detail": "Launch caps, leverage ceilings, and automated-only governance behavior remain intact.",
+            },
+        }
+        scorecard["overall_pass"] = all(
+            item["pass"] for key, item in scorecard.items() if key != "overall_pass"
+        )
+        return scorecard
+
+    def _depth_within_band_ratio(self, scenario: Mapping[str, Any]) -> float:
+        return round(
+            float(scenario["depth_score"])
+            * (1.0 - 0.45 * float(scenario["order_book_thinning_rate"])),
+            6,
+        )
+
+    def _vault_imbalance_score(
+        self,
+        scenario: Mapping[str, Any],
+        instrument: Mapping[str, Any],
+    ) -> float:
+        long_share = float(scenario["long_interest_share"])
+        stressed_open_interest = float(scenario["baseline_open_interest_usdc"]) * (
+            1.0 + 0.45 * float(scenario["shock_size"])
+        )
+        net_exposure = stressed_open_interest * abs((2.0 * long_share) - 1.0) * 0.45
+        cap = float(instrument["exposure_cap"]["open_interest_usd"])
+        return _clamp(net_exposure / max(cap, 1.0), 0.0, 1.0)
+
+    def _build_reproducibility_hash(
+        self,
+        *,
+        scenario_id: str,
+        aggregate_stress_level: str,
+        halt_state: str,
+        final_vault_capital: float,
+        funding_rate: float,
+        scorecard_pass: bool,
+    ) -> str:
+        return (
+            f"{scenario_id}|{aggregate_stress_level}|{halt_state}|"
+            f"{round(final_vault_capital, 2)}|{round(funding_rate, 6)}|"
+            f"{int(scorecard_pass)}"
+        )
+
+
+def load_default_harness() -> ShockSimulationHarness:
+    root = Path(__file__).resolve().parents[1]
+    return ShockSimulationHarness.from_paths(
+        scenario_path=root / "json" / "shock_validation_scenarios.json",
+        listing_pack_path=root / "workstreams" / "workstream_f2_phase_1_listing_pack.json",
+        response_matrix_path=root / "json" / "stress_response_orchestrator_matrix.json",
+    )
+
+
+if __name__ == "__main__":
+    harness = load_default_harness()
+    for result in harness.run_all():
+        print(json.dumps(result.as_dict(), indent=2))
diff --git a/ep_synthetic_frontier_sfx_derivatives_market_technical_design_brief_v2/solution/tests/test_shock_simulation_harness.py b/ep_synthetic_frontier_sfx_derivatives_market_technical_design_brief_v2/solution/tests/test_shock_simulation_harness.py
new file mode 100644
index 0000000000000000000000000000000000000000..6bb33a4bf277c917728ef9011a539a1b9349627b
--- /dev/null
+++ b/ep_synthetic_frontier_sfx_derivatives_market_technical_design_brief_v2/solution/tests/test_shock_simulation_harness.py
@@ -0,0 +1,67 @@
+from __future__ import annotations
+
+import sys
+from pathlib import Path
+
+
+SOLUTION_ROOT = Path(__file__).resolve().parents[1]
+if str(SOLUTION_ROOT) not in sys.path:
+    sys.path.insert(0, str(SOLUTION_ROOT))
+
+from shock_simulation_harness.engine import load_default_harness
+
+
+def test_scenario_library_covers_required_shock_band() -> None:
+    harness = load_default_harness()
+
+    shock_sizes = {scenario["shock_size"] for scenario in harness.scenario_library["scenarios"]}
+
+    assert 0.30 in shock_sizes
+    assert 0.50 in shock_sizes
+    assert len(harness.scenario_library["scenarios"]) >= 4
+
+
+def test_results_are_reproducible_and_attributable_to_control_reactions() -> None:
+    harness = load_default_harness()
+
+    first_pass = [result.as_dict() for result in harness.run_all()]
+    second_pass = [result.as_dict() for result in harness.run_all()]
+
+    assert first_pass == second_pass
+    for result in first_pass:
+        assert result["control_reactions"]["stress_response"]["actions"]
+        assert result["control_reactions"]["leverage_band"]["effective_leverage_band"][1] <= 2.0
+        assert result["reproducibility_hash"]
+
+
+def test_scorecard_covers_required_survivability_dimensions() -> None:
+    harness = load_default_harness()
+
+    for result in harness.run_all():
+        scorecard = result.scorecard
+        assert set(scorecard) == {
+            "vault_capital_integrity",
+            "liquidity_continuity",
+            "funding_stabilization",
+            "transparency_outputs",
+            "governance_stability",
+            "overall_pass",
+        }
+        assert scorecard["vault_capital_integrity"]["pass"] is True
+        assert scorecard["liquidity_continuity"]["pass"] is True
+        assert scorecard["funding_stabilization"]["pass"] is True
+        assert scorecard["transparency_outputs"]["pass"] is True
+        assert scorecard["governance_stability"]["pass"] is True
+        assert scorecard["overall_pass"] is True
+
+
+def test_severe_scenarios_use_staged_recovery_and_preserve_vault_capital() -> None:
+    harness = load_default_harness()
+    severe_results = [result for result in harness.run_all() if result.shock_size >= 0.42]
+
+    assert severe_results
+    for result in severe_results:
+        states = [item["state"] for item in result.market_status_timeline]
+        assert "HALTED_LOCKDOWN" in states
+        assert states[-1] == "ACTIVE_POST_RECOVERY"
+        assert result.vault_outcome["vault_integrity_preserved"] is True

@@ -0,0 +1,48 @@
+# Workstream F3 Shock Simulation And Scenario Validation Harness
+
+## Purpose
+
+This artifact defines the deterministic validation harness used to test the phase-1 sFX venue against `30%` to `50%` macro-shock scenarios while preserving isolated vault capital, functioning liquidity, and attributable automated control reactions.
+
+## Implemented Artifacts
+
+- `solution/json/shock_validation_scenarios.json`
+- `solution/shock_simulation_harness/engine.py`
+- `solution/tests/test_shock_simulation_harness.py`
+- `verification/validate_shock_scenarios.py`
+- `verification/workstream_f3_shock_scorecard_template.csv`
+
+## Harness Inputs
+
+The harness composes the existing workstream outputs instead of inventing a separate control model:
+
+- B2 order-book depth, thinning, and imbalance-derived stress inputs
+- B3 funding sign, multiplier, and vault-spread retention behavior
+- C1 isolated vault capital and open-interest cap constraints
+- C2 executable leverage compression via `dynamic_leverage_band_engine.py`
+- C3 spread widening and executable liquidity scoring
+- D1 metric thresholds and aggregate stress-level rules
+- D2 deterministic response matrix from `stress_response_orchestrator_matrix.json`
+- D3 halt and staged-reopening semantics
+- F2 phase-1 instrument caps and launch leverage limits
+
+## Scorecard Dimensions
+
+The scorecard emits deterministic pass/fail results for:
+
+- vault capital integrity
+- liquidity continuity
+- funding stabilization
+- transparency outputs
+- governance stability
+
+`overall_pass` is `true` only when all five dimensions pass.
+
+## Reproducibility
+
+The harness is deterministic:
+
+- no random sampling
+- no clock-dependent branching beyond scenario timestamps
+- result hash derived from scenario id plus key output states
+- pytest validates that repeated execution yields identical structured results
diff --git a/ep_synthetic_frontier_sfx_derivatives_market_technical_design_brief_v2/verification/validate_shock_scenarios.py b/ep_synthetic_frontier_sfx_derivatives_market_technical_design_brief_v2/verification/validate_shock_scenarios.py
new file mode 100644
index 0000000000000000000000000000000000000000..38dcb6dc641fdab07c599d882898c7549ae02bef
--- /dev/null
+++ b/ep_synthetic_frontier_sfx_derivatives_market_technical_design_brief_v2/verification/validate_shock_scenarios.py
@@ -0,0 +1,49 @@
+from __future__ import annotations
+
+import json
+import sys
+from pathlib import Path
+
+
+EPIC_ROOT = Path(__file__).resolve().parents[1]
+SOLUTION_ROOT = EPIC_ROOT / "solution"
+if str(SOLUTION_ROOT) not in sys.path:
+    sys.path.insert(0, str(SOLUTION_ROOT))
+
+from shock_simulation_harness.engine import load_default_harness
+
+
+OUTPUT_PATH = EPIC_ROOT / "verification" / "workstream_f3_shock_validation_results.json"
+
+
+def main() -> None:
+    harness = load_default_harness()
+    results = [result.as_dict() for result in harness.run_all()]
+
+    OUTPUT_PATH.write_text(json.dumps(results, indent=2), encoding="utf-8")
+
+    scenario_ids = [result["scenario_id"] for result in results]
+    assert any(result["shock_size"] == 0.3 for result in results)
+    assert any(result["shock_size"] == 0.5 for result in results)
+
+    for result in results:
+        scorecard = result["scorecard"]
+        assert scorecard["vault_capital_integrity"]["pass"] is True
+        assert scorecard["liquidity_continuity"]["pass"] is True
+        assert scorecard["funding_stabilization"]["pass"] is True
+        assert scorecard["transparency_outputs"]["pass"] is True
+        assert scorecard["governance_stability"]["pass"] is True
+        assert scorecard["overall_pass"] is True
+        assert result["control_reactions"]["stress_response"]["actions"]
+        assert result["reproducibility_hash"]
+
+    print(
+        "shock_validation_passed "
+        f"scenarios={len(results)} "
+        f"scenario_ids={','.join(scenario_ids)} "
+        f"artifact={OUTPUT_PATH}"
+    )
+
+
+if __name__ == "__main__":
+    main()

+{
+  "schema_version": "1.0.0",
+  "generated_on": "2026-03-18",
+  "description": "Deterministic macro-shock scenarios for validating sFX launch survivability under 30-50% event conditions.",
+  "scorecard_dimensions": [
+    "vault_capital_integrity",
+    "liquidity_continuity",
+    "funding_stabilization",
+    "transparency_outputs",
+    "governance_stability"
+  ],
+  "scenarios": [
+    {
+      "scenario_id": "ngn_macro_shock_30_guarded_liquidity",
+      "instrument_id": "NGN_VOL",
+      "event_timestamp": "2026-03-18T17:45:00Z",
+      "shock_size": 0.3,
+      "liquidity_regime": "guarded",
+      "source_degradation_mode": "degraded",
+      "base_vault_capital_usdc": 1250000,
+      "baseline_open_interest_usdc": 240000,
+      "long_interest_share": 0.61,
+      "realized_volatility": 0.42,
+      "depth_score": 0.58,
+      "stress_velocity": 0.49,
+      "volatility_acceleration": 0.46,
+      "imbalance_slope_change": 27.0,
+      "liquidation_cluster_density": 0.031,
+      "order_book_thinning_rate": 0.34,
+      "source_health_score": 0.82,
+      "source_quorum_met": true,
+      "index_divergence_bps": 740,
+      "recovery_profile": "continuous",
+      "governance_override": "none"
+    },
+    {
+      "scenario_id": "kes_macro_shock_35_proxy_latency",
+      "instrument_id": "KES_VOL",
+      "event_timestamp": "2026-03-18T17:46:00Z",
+      "shock_size": 0.35,
+      "liquidity_regime": "guarded_plus",
+      "source_degradation_mode": "hold_last_value",
+      "base_vault_capital_usdc": 1325000,
+      "baseline_open_interest_usdc": 285000,
+      "long_interest_share": 0.64,
+      "realized_volatility": 0.5,
+      "depth_score": 0.54,
+      "stress_velocity": 0.57,
+      "volatility_acceleration": 0.61,
+      "imbalance_slope_change": 33.0,
+      "liquidation_cluster_density": 0.036,
+      "order_book_thinning_rate": 0.38,
+      "source_health_score": 0.73,
+      "source_quorum_met": true,
+      "index_divergence_bps": 910,
+      "recovery_profile": "continuous",
+      "governance_override": "none"
+    },
+    {
+      "scenario_id": "ghs_macro_shock_42_depth_vacuum",
+      "instrument_id": "GHS_VOL",
+      "event_timestamp": "2026-03-18T17:47:00Z",
+      "shock_size": 0.42,
+      "liquidity_regime": "thin",
+      "source_degradation_mode": "hold_last_value",
+      "base_vault_capital_usdc": 1180000,
+      "baseline_open_interest_usdc": 185000,
+      "long_interest_share": 0.67,
+      "realized_volatility": 0.62,
+      "depth_score": 0.43,
+      "stress_velocity": 0.66,
+      "volatility_acceleration": 0.73,
+      "imbalance_slope_change": 38.0,
+      "liquidation_cluster_density": 0.043,
+      "order_book_thinning_rate": 0.49,
+      "source_health_score": 0.71,
+      "source_quorum_met": true,
+      "index_divergence_bps": 1090,
+      "recovery_profile": "staged_reopen",
+      "governance_override": "none"
+    },
+    {
+      "scenario_id": "zar_macro_shock_50_offshore_dislocation",
+      "instrument_id": "ZAR_VOL",
+      "event_timestamp": "2026-03-18T17:48:00Z",
+      "shock_size": 0.5,
+      "liquidity_regime": "dislocated",
+      "source_degradation_mode": "hold_last_value",
+      "base_vault_capital_usdc": 1550000,
+      "baseline_open_interest_usdc": 360000,
+      "long_interest_share": 0.68,
+      "realized_volatility": 0.74,
+      "depth_score": 0.39,
+      "stress_velocity": 0.82,
+      "volatility_acceleration": 0.83,
+      "imbalance_slope_change": 44.0,
+      "liquidation_cluster_density": 0.052,
+      "order_book_thinning_rate": 0.57,
+      "source_health_score": 0.76,
+      "source_quorum_met": true,
+      "index_divergence_bps": 1280,
+      "recovery_profile": "staged_reopen",
+      "governance_override": "none"
+    }
+  ]
+}

+

diff --git a/ep_synthetic_frontier_sfx_derivatives_market_technical_design_brief_v2/solution/shock_simulation_harness/engine.py b/ep_synthetic_frontier_sfx_derivatives_market_technical_design_brief_v2/solution/shock_simulation_harness/engine.py
